title: Homes England advice notes — Homes England project case studies
body: "Together with our partners, we are continuing to strengthen our approach to community engagement.  Our project case studies aim to share how we take a tailored approach to community engagement that reflects the local context, scale and type of development project, and stage within the planning, housing and regeneration process.  We aim to embed an outcomes-focused approach, supporting the delivery of locally relevant social value from the early stages of a project. We reflect on our own experiences to promote a culture of continuous learning. "
